Inside the session

What we'll cover. A few things we'll touch.

This is how I share my work with 400+ current investors — the top 30 private companies in America, what makes one worth real attention, a live deal walkthrough, and time for questions.

01

Sourcing

How I find deals before they hit the open market.

02

Pattern recognition

What I look for in a winner that everyone else misses.

03

How much to invest

How I price risk, time entries, and project exit.

04

400+ investors

I share my work with 400+ current investors and we do deals together.

What you'll learn

Single deal focus. How conviction gets built.

I'll share the process I use to source, evaluate, and stay close to private companies. The goal is to make the thinking visible, not bury you in a polished deck.

01
How the position was built
The sourcing path, relationship network, and diligence work that goes into identifying a company.
02
What catches my attention
The traits I look for before a company becomes widely talked about: customer demand, execution quality, management depth, and a credible path to liquidity.
03
A live deal walkthrough
A current opportunity walkthrough designed to show the decision process while the information is still useful.
04
How to think about access
Why private-market edge often comes from relationships, timing, and judgment rather than another generic allocation model.
Register
The approach

Learn the process. 400+ investors used to invest $50 million.

The focus is on businesses with tangible demand, capable teams, and a reason to believe value can compound before the broader market notices. Track record: a $120M position built through private-company access, operator diligence, and concentrated conviction.

01

Exit strategies

Manufacturing or software businesses with real, tangible assets.

02

High-quality deals

Businesses with real demand, not just a market story.

03

Proven operators

Teams with evidence of execution and a credible plan.

04

Built-in off-ramps

Thoughtful attention to liquidity path from the start.

What this is not

What you'll get. Instead of the usual webinar.

Not this

Not a generic "intro level" webinar. Not last year's presentation. Not a public stock pitch. Not a wealth management lecture.

What you'll get

The thinking behind a real private-company position, a current opportunity walkthrough, and specific diligence questions to ask earlier.

Live context

Context you can't get from a replay — because there isn't one.

Join live

Be in the room. While the analysis is still fresh.

If this is the kind of private-market thinking you want to sharpen, reserve a seat and join the live session on July 16 at 9:00 AM PST.
